paragraphs.title: S3E Cleaned up MATCH map (first pass).
paragraphs.text:
UNWIND range(7,7) AS n
WITH toString(n) AS iN, "30" as iM
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'4',MaxN:iM,N:iN})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
//RETURN aN.ScalarProduct,aN.DegreeSum,aN.ResultDivisor,cl.tft,cl.Divisor,iN,iM
WITH {DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aN.ScalarProduct, ResultDegree:aN.DegreeSum, ResultDivisor:aN.ResultDivisor}), ET:cl.tft, Divisor:cl.Divisor} AS resultProduct,iN,iM,max(aN.ResultDivisor) AS maxDivisor

//RETURN resultProduct
WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,resultProduct.ET as eT,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,eT,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,ET:eT,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.ET as eTrm,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor,eTrm
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI
//RETURN rSLI.RScalar,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor,eTrm
WITH COLLECT(rSLI.RScalar) as cts,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,"0" as accumulator,maxDivisor
CREATE (a:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN cts| SET a.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(a.acc,n))  // Divisor (aka rowCounter)
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:a.acc}),DivideBy:rDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN 
//WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:apoc.number.exact.mul(a.acc,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN
//RETURN pTerms
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD
UNWIND dSList as dSListU

//RETURN dSListU.Degree,dSListU.Scalar,pTD

CREATE (c:Accumulator {acc:"1"})   
FOREACH (n IN RANGE(1,toInteger(dSListU.Degree))| SET c.acc = apoc.number.exact.mul(c.acc,toString(iM)))   //  dSListU.Degree must be integer
With apoc.number.exact.mul(dSListU.Scalar,c.acc) as scalarDegreeProduct,pTD,iN,iM
WITH {SDP:COLLECT(scalarDegreeProduct),DivideBy:toString(pTD)} as termsMap,iN,iM
//Return termsMap
WITH COLLECT(termsMap) AS termsMapC,iN,iM
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(termsMapC)-1) as pTT
CREATE (b:Accumulator { acc:"0" ,db:toString(termsMapC[pTT].DivideBy) })
FOREACH (n IN termsMapC[pTT].SDP| SET b.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(b.acc,n))
WITH apoc.number.exact.div(b.acc,toString(b.db)) AS pResult,b,iM,iN

WITH COLLECT(pResult) as evaluates,iN,iM
//return evaluates,iN,iM
CREATE (d:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN evaluates| SET d.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(d.acc,n)) 

RETURN d.acc as Value

paragraphs.text:
UNWIND range(18,18) AS n
WITH toString(n) AS iN, "20" as iM
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'256',MaxN:iM,N:iN})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
WITH {DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aN.ScalarProduct, ResultDegree:aN.DegreeSum, ResultDivisor:aN.ResultDivisor}), ET:cl.tft, Divisor:cl.Divisor} AS resultProduct,iN,iM,max(aN.ResultDivisor) AS maxDivisor
//RETURN resultProduct
WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,resultProduct.ET as eT,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor


UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,eT,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
// Maps of Lists of scalars in context of Degree, Divisor and Target RowCounter
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,ET:eT,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
                                                                 
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.ET as eTrm,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor,eTrm
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI
//RETURN rSLI.RScalar,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor,eTrm
WITH COLLECT(rSLI.RScalar) as cts,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,"0" as accumulator,maxDivisor



CREATE (a:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN cts| SET a.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(a.acc,n))  // Divisor (aka rowCounter)
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:a.acc}),DivideBy:rDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN 
//WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:apoc.number.exact.mul(a.acc,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN
//RETURN pTerms
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD
UNWIND dSList as dSListU
//RETURN dSListU.Degree,dSListU.Scalar,pTD
CREATE (c:Accumulator {acc:"1"})   
FOREACH (n IN RANGE(1,toInteger(dSListU.Degree))| SET c.acc = apoc.number.exact.mul(c.acc,toString(iM)))   //  dSListU.Degree must be integer
With apoc.number.exact.mul(dSListU.Scalar,c.acc) as scalarDegreeProduct,pTD,iN,iM
WITH {SDP:COLLECT(scalarDegreeProduct),DivideBy:toString(pTD)} as termsMap,iN,iM
//Return termsMap
WITH COLLECT(termsMap) AS termsMapC,iN,iM
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(termsMapC)-1) as pTT
CREATE (b:Accumulator { acc:"0" ,db:toString(termsMapC[pTT].DivideBy) })
FOREACH (n IN termsMapC[pTT].SDP| SET b.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(b.acc,n))
WITH apoc.number.exact.div(b.acc,toString(b.db)) AS pResult,b,iM,iN

WITH COLLECT(pResult) as evaluates,iN,iM
//return evaluates,iN,iM
CREATE (d:Accumulator { acc:"0"})
FOREACH (n IN evaluates| SET d.acc = apoc.number.exact.add(d.acc,n)) 

RETURN d.acc as Value

paragraphs.title: CS3T
paragraphs.text:
%neo4j

CYPHER runtime=interpreted 
UNWIND range(13,13) AS n
WITH toString(n) AS iN, "1000" as iM
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'64',MaxN:iM,N:iN})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
WITH max(aN.ResultDivisor) AS maxDivisor,iN,iM
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'64',MaxN:iM,N:iN})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
//RETURN aN.ScalarProduct,aN.DegreeSum,aN.ResultDivisor,cl.tft,cl.Divisor,iN,iM
WITH {DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aN.ScalarProduct, ResultDegree:aN.DegreeSum, ResultDivisor:aN.ResultDivisor}), ET:cl.tft, Divisor:cl.Divisor} AS resultProduct,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,resultProduct.ET as eT,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,eT,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,ET:eT,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.ET as eTrm,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor,eTrm
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI
WITH COLLECT(apoc.number.exact.mul(rSLI.RScalar,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))) as cts,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor,eTrm 
WITH REDUCE(sum='0', x in cts | apoc.number.exact.add(sum,toString(x))) as acc,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor,eTrm
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:acc}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN,eTrm 
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN,eTrm
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD,eTrm
UNWIND dSList as dSListU
WITH dSListU.Degree AS tDegree,dSListU.Scalar AS tScalar,iN,iM,pTD,eTrm
RETURN tDegree,tScalar,iN,iM,pTD,eTrm

paragraphs.title: Candidate S3A depricated
paragraphs.text:
UNWIND range(7,7) AS n
WITH toString(n) AS iN, "20" as iM
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'8',MaxN:iM,N:iN})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
WITH max(aN.ResultDivisor) AS maxDivisor,iN,iM
MATCH (cl:CollectedProductArgNode {Dimension:'8',MaxN:iM,N:iN})-[:Arguments]->(aN:ArgumentsNode)
//RETURN aN.ScalarProduct,aN.DegreeSum,aN.ResultDivisor,cl.tft,cl.Divisor,iN,iM
WITH {DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:aN.ScalarProduct, ResultDegree:aN.DegreeSum, ResultDivisor:aN.ResultDivisor}), Divisor:cl.Divisor} AS resultProduct,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI

//RETURN rSLI.RScalar,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(apoc.number.exact.mul(rSLI.RScalar,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))) as cts,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor
WITH REDUCE(sum='0', x in cts | apoc.number.exact.add(sum,toString(x))) as acc,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(acc) as accc,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH REDUCE(sum='0', x in accc | apoc.number.exact.add(sum,toString(x))) as acc,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:acc}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN 
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD
UNWIND dSList as dSListU
WITH dSListU.Degree AS aDegree,dSListU.Scalar AS tScalar,iN,iM,pTD
RETURN aDegree,tScalar,pTD,iM,iN

paragraphs.title: CS3A (to read cs3t write D)
paragraphs.text:
CYPHER runtime=interpreted 
UNWIND range(13,13) AS n
WITH toString(n) AS iN, "1000" as iM
MATCH (v:VertexNode)<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy {N:iN,MaxN:iM,Dimension:'64'})-[]->(e:Evaluate)
WITH iN, iM, max(vI.divisor) as maxDivisor
MATCH (v:VertexNode)<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy {N:iN,MaxN:iM,Dimension:'64'})-[]->(e:Evaluate)
// return v.Scalar,v.Degree,vI.divisor,vI.twoSeq
WITH {DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:v.Scalar, ResultDegree:v.Degree, ResultDivisor:vI.divisor}), Divisor:vI.twoSeq} AS resultProduct,iN,iM,maxDivisor

WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI

//RETURN rSLI.RScalar,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(apoc.number.exact.mul(rSLI.RScalar,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))) as cts,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor
WITH REDUCE(sum='0', x in cts | apoc.number.exact.add(sum,toString(x))) as acc,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(acc) as accc,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH REDUCE(sum='0', x in accc | apoc.number.exact.add(sum,toString(x))) as acc,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:acc}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN 
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD
UNWIND dSList as dSListU
WITH dSListU.Degree AS aDegree,dSListU.Scalar AS aScalar,iN,iM,pTD
RETURN aDegree,aScalar,pTD,iM,iN

paragraphs.text:
CYPHER runtime=interpreted 
UNWIND range(2,17) AS n
WITH toString(n) AS iN, "1000" as iM
MATCH (v:VertexNode)<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy {N:iN,MaxN:iM,Dimension:'16'})-[]->(e:Evaluate)
WITH iN, iM, max(vI.divisor) as maxDivisor
MATCH (v:VertexNode)<-[vI:VertexIndexedBy]-(i:IndexedBy {N:iN,MaxN:iM,Dimension:'16'})-[]->(e:Evaluate)
WITH {DS:COLLECT({ResultScalar:v.Scalar, ResultDegree:v.Degree, ResultDivisor:vI.divisor}), Divisor:vI.twoSeq} AS resultProduct,iN,iM,maxDivisor

WITH COLLECT(resultProduct) as rPC,iN,iM,resultProduct.Divisor as rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rPC)-1) as iI
WITH rPC[iI].DS as rPCDS,iN,iM,rpD1,maxDivisor
UNWIND rPCDS as rPCDSU
WITH {RScalarList:COLLECT({RScalar:rPCDSU.ResultScalar}),RDegree:rPCDSU.ResultDegree,RDivisor:rPCDSU.ResultDivisor,Divisor:rpD1} as resultMap,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(resultMap) as resultMapC,resultMap.RDivisor as rDivisor,resultMap.RDegree as rDRM,iN,iM,resultMap.Divisor as rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(resultMapC)-1) as iII
WITH resultMapC[iII].RScalarList as rSL,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(rSL)-1) as iIII
UNWIND rSL[iIII] as rSLI

//RETURN rSLI.RScalar,rDivisor,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(apoc.number.exact.mul(rSLI.RScalar,apoc.number.exact.div(maxDivisor,rDivisor))) as cts,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor
WITH REDUCE(sum='0', x in cts | apoc.number.exact.add(sum,toString(x))) as acc,rDRM,iN,iM,rpD2,maxDivisor
WITH COLLECT(acc) as accc,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH REDUCE(sum='0', x in accc | apoc.number.exact.add(sum,toString(x))) as acc,rDRM,iN,iM,maxDivisor
WITH {DSList:COLLECT({Degree:rDRM,Scalar:acc}),DivideBy:maxDivisor} AS pTerms,iM,iN 
WITH COLLECT(pTerms) as pTermss,iM,iN
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(pTermss)-1) as pT
WITH pTermss[pT].DSList as dSList,iN,iM,pTermss[pT].DivideBy AS pTD
UNWIND dSList as dSListU

WITH REDUCE(sum='1', x in RANGE(1,toInteger(dSListU.Degree)) | apoc.number.exact.mul(sum,toString(iM))) as acc,iN,iM,dSListU,pTD
With apoc.number.exact.mul(dSListU.Scalar,acc) as scalarDegreeProduct,iN,iM,pTD
WITH {SDP:COLLECT(scalarDegreeProduct),DivideBy:toString(pTD)} as termsMap,iN,iM
WITH COLLECT(termsMap) AS termsMapC,iN,iM
UNWIND RANGE(0,SIZE(termsMapC)-1) AS pTT
WITH REDUCE(sum='0', x IN termsMapC[pTT].SDP | apoc.number.exact.add(sum,toString(x))) AS acc,toString(termsMapC[pTT].DivideBy) AS dB,iM,iN
WITH apoc.number.exact.div(acc,dB) AS pResult,acc,dB,iM,iN
WITH COLLECT(pResult) AS evaluates,iN,iM
WITH REDUCE (sum='0', n IN evaluates| apoc.number.exact.add(sum,n)) AS acc 
RETURN acc as Value
